posts.text:
Rachel Maddow’s award-winning podcast “Ultra” is back for a second season. Rachel Maddow tells the story of an international manhunt for a spy that infiltrated the U.S. Army’s war crime prosecutions in post-war Germany. 

Listen to the trailer and follow: link.chtbl.com/rmpust_scl

Video
